name: Arni Exohiko ("Surprise" Lamb, Country Style )
recipeIngredient: 1/2 lb Kasseri cheese, cut into 8 pieces
recipeInstructions:
Note: 3/4-inch slices leg of lamb may be used instead of lamb chops.
In a heavy skillet, heat the olive oil or melted butter over high heat. Fry the lamb chops frequently and turn them as needed until browned on all sides. Remove from the heat and let cool slightly.
1. Unroll the filo sheets and cover with a damp towel to prevent drying.
2. In a small pan, melt the remaining butter over low heat.
3. Take two layers of filo dough and brush both sides with hot butter.
4. In the center of the buttered filo, place 1 lamb chop, 2 tablespoons peas, 2 potato balls, 2 cherry tomatoes, and 1 slice of kasseri cheese. Season with salt, pepper, a generous sprinkle of chopped parsley, and a pinch of oregano.
5. Fold the filo around the lamb and vegetables to form a sealed parcel, enclosing all ingredients securely.
6. Place the parcels seam-side down on a buttered baking dish measuring approximately 11 x 15 x 3 inches.
7. Brush the tops of the parcels with hot butter.
8. Bake in a moderate oven preheated to 350°F (175°C) for 45 to 50 minutes, or until golden brown and cooked through.
9. Remove from the oven and serve warm on a platter or individual plates, accompanied by a fresh salad.
Note: Vegetables and herbs can be varied. Substitute green beans or lima beans for peas, and use thyme or basil instead of oregano. Arni Exohiko is often prepared using buttered wax paper, parchment paper, or aluminum foil instead of filo sheets.
